title: Deliciously Dense Ukrainian Cheese Curds Dumplings
description: A hearty Ukrainian dish featuring cheese curds, infused oil, and no onions or garlic, perfect for a weeknight dinner. This malty, shaggy dish is sure to become a favorite.
instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine the flour, cheese curds, infused oil, eggs, salt, sugar, and milk, stirring until a shaggy dough forms.
Add the active dry yeast to the dough and mix until fully incorporated.
Knead the dough on a floured surface for 10 minutes, until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a damp cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour, or until it has doubled in size.
Preheat a large pot of salted water to 190 degrees Fahrenheit.
Once the water is boiling, use a spoon to drop the dough into the water, forming dumplings.
Cook the dumplings for 10 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Remove the dumplings from the water with a slotted spoon and place them on a plate.
Drizzle the melted butter over the dumplings and serve hot.
